skywrite::vision_light_sound.issue: Skywrite creates visible cloud words in a sky location the caster can see; the visibility and sky placement are prose-only.
skywrite::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add visible sky-writing fields for text count, sky placement, and cloud-made appearance.
skywrite::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime skyWriting or environmentalMessage data with visible text placement.

skywrite::message_or_communication.issue: Skywrite creates up to ten words as a persistent public message, but runtime only stores this communication as a generic utility description.
skywrite::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add public written-message fields for maximum word count, medium, placement, and duration.
skywrite::message_or_communication.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communication/message data for up to ten cloud words.

skywrite::environmental_change.issue: Skywrite's strong-wind early ending is now typed under conditionalEndings, but the spell still creates persistent cloud words in the sky and that environmental/message object remains prose-only.
skywrite::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental creation fields for cloud-based sky-writing effects. Do not duplicate the strong-wind ending here; it is covered by Conditional Ending fields.
skywrite::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange or skyWriting data for cloud word creation while keeping strongWindDisperses represented by conditionalEndings.

skywrite::conditional_ending.closedReason: Skywrite now records strong_wind_disperses_effect in structured markdown and runtime conditionalEndings. The normal word disappearance at duration end is ordinary cleanup, and cloud-message creation remains open under message/environment buckets.
skywrite::conditional_ending.issue: A strong wind can disperse the clouds and end the spell early, which is not modeled as a conditional ending.
skywrite::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending fields for strong-wind dispersal.
skywrite::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ending condition for strong wind dispersing the cloud words.

skywrite::aftermath_or_memory.issue: The words dissipating when the spell ends is normal cleanup of the created cloud message, while the actionable early-ending wind rule is tracked under conditional ending.
skywrite::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedTemplateChange: No separate aftermath field required for ordinary disappearance at duration end.
skywrite::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedJsonChange: No separate aftermath JSON field required beyond the created-message duration and wind ending.

spider-climb::terrain_or_surface.issue: Spider Climb grants movement across vertical surfaces and ceilings while leaving hands free, plus a Climb Speed equal to Speed; runtime stores this only in prose.
spider-climb::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement grant fields for vertical surfaces, ceilings, hands-free climbing, and climb speed equal to base Speed.
spider-climb::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementGrant data for surface traversal and climb speed.

spider-climb::conditional_ending.issue: The phrase 'until the spell ends' is ordinary duration scoping for the movement benefit.
spider-climb::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No conditional-ending field required beyond the timed concentration duration.

spike-growth::terrain_or_surface.issue: Spike Growth creates difficult terrain, damaging spikes, and camouflaged hazardous ground with Search action recognition rules; runtime has a terrain effect but keeps camouflage and recognition details in prose.
spike-growth::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain hazard fields for difficult terrain, per-distance damage, camouflage, and Search action recognition using Perception or Survival against spell save DC.
spike-growth::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Extend runtime TERRAIN data with camouflage and recognition-check fields.

spike-growth::vision_light_sound.issue: Creatures that cannot see the area when the spell is cast need a Search action and successful Wisdom check to recognize the hazard before entering.
spike-growth::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime hazardRecognition data keyed to whether the creature saw the area at casting.

spike-growth::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: Damage triggers when a creature moves into or within the area and is calculated for every 5 feet traveled, but runtime only states this in the terrain description.
spike-growth::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement-triggered terrain damage fields for entering/within-area movement and damage per distance.
spike-growth::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrainDamageTrigger data for 2d4 Piercing per 5 feet traveled.

spike-growth::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: The detector matched movement wording for damage measurement, but Spike Growth does not grant travel, teleportation, or planar movement.
spike-growth::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Track the movement-distance damage under terrain hazard fields, not travel fields.
spike-growth::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Track the movement-distance damage under terrainDamageTrigger, not travel data.

spike-growth::environmental_change.issue: The spell transforms the ground into camouflaged hazardous difficult terrain, which is a world-state terrain change not fully typed.
spike-growth::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental/terrain transformation fields for ground sprouts, natural camouflage, and hazard recognition.
spike-growth::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmental terrain transformation details or extend the TERRAIN effect accordingly.

spiritual-weapon::choice_or_mode.issue: Spiritual Weapon creates a floating force in a chosen space and lets the caster choose its weapon-like appearance; the chosen space and persistent force are not modeled as a created controlled effect.
spiritual-weapon::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created controlled force fields for chosen appearance, starting space, attack reach from the force, and duration.
spiritual-weapon::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlledEntity or createdForce data for the weapon-like force.

spiritual-weapon::attack_or_save_modifie.issue: The initial and repeated melee spell attacks are represented as hit-gated DAMAGE effects; the later-turn bonus-action cost was corrected in runtime JSON.
spiritual-weapon::attack_or_save_modifie.recommendedTemplateChange: No attack/save modifier field required for this reviewed row.
spiritual-weapon::attack_or_save_modifie.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by preserving melee spell attack damage effects and correcting the repeated attack sustain cost to bonus_action.

spiritual-weapon::sustain_or_recast_acti.issue: The later-turn Bonus Action can both move the force up to 20 feet and repeat the attack from the force's position; runtime now has the bonus-action sustain cost but still lacks controlled-force movement data.
spiritual-weapon::sustain_or_recast_acti.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustain action fields that combine moving a persistent effect and making an attack from its new position.
spiritual-weapon::sustain_or_recast_acti.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlledEntity movement data for moving the force up to 20 feet before the repeated attack.

spiritual-weapon::deferred_descriptive_f.issue: The exact spectral weapon appearance is descriptive choice unless and until the renderer needs a cosmetic asset selector.
spiritual-weapon::deferred_descriptive_f.recommendedTemplateChange: No mechanical field required for the cosmetic weapon appearance in this goal.
spiritual-weapon::deferred_descriptive_f.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime mechanical field required for the cosmetic weapon appearance in this goal.

suggestion::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Suggestion's Wisdom save that negates the Charmed/control effect is represented in both utility and status-condition effects.
suggestion::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No attack/save field change required for this reviewed row.
suggestion::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by preserving the Wisdom save and removing stale Construct/Undead target exclusions that were not in canonical prose.

suggestion::vision_light_sound.issue: Suggestion's target hearing and understanding prerequisites are represented by Target Can Hear/Understand Caster and runtime communicationPrerequisites; prompt word-count details remain open under message_or_communication.
suggestion::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field needed; existing target communication prerequisite fields now cover this eligibility mechanic.
suggestion::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime targeting/effect communicationPrerequisites now require the target to hear and understand the caster.

suggestion::message_or_communication.issue: The suggested course of activity must be communicated in no more than 25 words; this word limit and communication payload are not typed.
suggestion::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spoken command/suggestion fields for maximum word count and language/hearing understanding prerequisites.
suggestion::message_or_communication.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime suggestionPayload data for maxWords 25 plus hearing/understanding requirements.

suggestion::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: The target must pursue a reasonable, achievable, non-obviously-harmful suggestion to the best of its ability; runtime stores this social-control rule in prose only.
suggestion::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Add social-control fields for achievable command, non-obvious-harm restriction, and compelled pursuit behavior.
suggestion::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime socialControl data while preserving ai_dm arbitration for open-ended command judgment.

suggestion::status_or_state_change.issue: The Charmed condition on failed Wisdom save is represented as a STATUS_CONDITION effect.
suggestion::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional status field required for the Charmed condition.
suggestion::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: No additional status JSON change required for the Charmed condition.

suggestion::conditional_ending.issue: Suggestion ends for the target if the caster or allies damage it, or when the suggested activity is completed early; these ending conditions are prose-only.
suggestion::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending fields for damage by caster/allies and completion of the suggested activity.
suggestion::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ending conditions for caster/allies damage and task completion.
suggestion::conditional_ending.closedReason: Closed by reusing caster_or_ally_damages_target, adding the suggested_activity_completed trigger value, and recording both ending conditions in Suggestion's structured markdown and runtime JSON.

summon-beast::choice_or_mode.issue: Summon Beast requires choosing Air, Land, or Water, and that choice changes movement, traits, HP, and other stat-block details.
summon-beast::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon mode/stat-block variant fields for Air, Land, and Water.
summon-beast::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonOptions data keyed by chosen environment.

summon-beast::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The summoned spirit's attack bonus uses the caster's spell attack modifier, and Pack Tactics can grant Advantage for Land/Water forms; runtime has no typed summon attack/stat-block data.
summon-beast::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon attack fields for attack bonus source, reach, damage formula, multiattack count, and Pack Tactics advantage condition.
summon-beast::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon stat block attack data instead of prose-only utility text.

summon-beast::reaction_or_opportunity_re.issue: The Air form's Flyby trait prevents Opportunity Attacks when it flies out of enemy reach, but runtime has no typed summon trait data.
summon-beast::reaction_or_opportunity_re.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon trait fields for Opportunity Attack avoidance by movement mode.
summon-beast::reaction_or_opportunity_re.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon trait data for Air-only Flyby.

summon-beast::target_filter_or_eligibili.issue: The spirit must manifest in an unoccupied visible space within range, but runtime only targets a point.
summon-beast::target_filter_or_eligibili.recommendedTemplateChange: Add unoccupied-space and visible-space eligibility fields for summons.
summon-beast::target_filter_or_eligibili.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon placement filters for unoccupied and visible space.

summon-beast::vision_light_sound.issue: The summoned spirit has Darkvision 60 feet, but the runtime has no typed summoned-creature senses.
summon-beast::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon stat block senses with Darkvision 60 feet.

summon-beast::message_or_communication.issue: The spirit understands the languages the caster knows and obeys verbal commands with no action required; language understanding and command channel are prose-only.
summon-beast::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon communication fields for understood languages and verbal command cost.

summon-beast::created_object_or_structur.issue: The detector matched stat-block prose, but Summon Beast creates a creature spirit rather than an object or structure.
summon-beast::created_object_or_structur.recommendedTemplateChange: Track the mechanic under summon/stat-block fields.
summon-beast::created_object_or_structur.recommendedJsonChange: Track the mechanic under summonOptions/statBlock data.

summon-beast::summon_or_controlled_entit.issue: The bestial spirit's placement, ally status, initiative, default Dodge behavior, verbal command obedience, disappearance rules, and stat-block variants are flattened into utility prose.
summon-beast::summon_or_controlled_entit.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon entity fields for stat block, initiative timing, ally relation, command behavior, default action, and disappearance conditions.
summon-beast::summon_or_controlled_entit.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime SUMMON/summonEntity data instead of a generic UTILITY effect.

summon-beast::resource_or_consumption.issue: The costly material component is already represented and not consumed; the detector's remaining matches are stat-block scaling text, not resource consumption.
summon-beast::resource_or_consumption.recommendedTemplateChange: No resource field change required for this reviewed row.

summon-beast::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Ally status, understood languages, and command obedience are summon-control mechanics currently stored as prose.
summon-beast::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon allegiance and command-understanding fields.
summon-beast::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon allegiance and command data.

summon-beast::object_stats_or_damageabil.issue: The summoned spirit's AC, HP, speeds, senses, passive Perception, proficiency bonus, and attack/damage formulas are all stat-block values flattened into text.
summon-beast::object_stats_or_damageabil.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon stat-block fields with formulas by spell level and chosen environment.
summon-beast::object_stats_or_damageabil.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon stat block data for AC, HP, speeds, senses, PB, attacks, and damage.

summon-beast::status_or_state_change.issue: The Incapacitated text is a Pack Tactics prerequisite on an ally, not a condition the spell applies.
summon-beast::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Track the condition prerequisite under summon attack trait fields.
summon-beast::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Track the condition prerequisite under Pack Tactics summon trait data.

summon-beast::environmental_change.issue: Air, Land, and Water are summon mode choices, not world environmental changes.
summon-beast::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Track environment choice under summon mode/stat-block variants.

summon-beast::conditional_ending.closedReason: Summon Beast now records created_entity_drops_to_0_hp in structured markdown and runtime conditionalEndings with effect scope. Other summon stat-block, command, mode, placement, and trait mechanics remain open in their own buckets.
summon-beast::conditional_ending.issue: The spirit disappears when it drops to 0 Hit Points or when the spell ends; runtime has no typed summon disappearance/end condition.
summon-beast::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon ending fields for disappears at 0 HP and spell end.

summon-beast::aftermath_or_memory.issue: The disappearance text is an ending condition for the summon, not a separate aftermath or memory mechanic.

warding-bond::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The +1 AC bonus is represented, but the +1 saving throw bonus while within 60 feet is not first-class in runtime JSON.
warding-bond::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add saving throw bonus fields parallel to AC bonus fields.
warding-bond::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime save bonus data for +1 to all saving throws while linked and in range.

warding-bond::object_stats_or_damageabil.issue: The 0 Hit Points text is a conditional ending for the caster, not object stats or damageability.

warding-bond::damage_reduction_or_preven.issue: Resistance to all damage is represented, but the caster taking the same amount of damage whenever the target takes damage is prose-only utility text.
warding-bond::damage_reduction_or_preven.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked damage transfer fields for mirroring damage from target to caster.
warding-bond::damage_reduction_or_preven.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime linkedDamage data for same-amount damage to caster.
warding-bond::damage_reduction_or_preven.reviewerNote: Closed by adding Linked Damage Trigger/Recipient/Amount plus Amount Basis, Type Source, and Recipient Mitigation structured fields. Runtime effects[].linkedDamage records target_takes_damage -> caster -> same_amount, based on post_target_mitigation damage, using the triggering damage type, with recipientMitigation not_reapplied so the caster does not apply resistance/vulnerability a second time to the mirrored amount. The 0 HP, distance, and recast endings are now closed under conditional_ending.

warding-bond::conditional_ending.closedReason: Warding Bond now records all three spell-ending triggers in structured markdown and runtime conditionalEndings: caster_drops_to_0_hp, linked_creatures_separated_beyond_distance, and spell_cast_again_on_connected_creature. The saving throw bonus, ring-wearing requirement, and link-range gating for benefits remain open in their own rows.
warding-bond::conditional_ending.issue: Warding Bond ends if the caster drops to 0 HP, the pair separates by more than 60 feet, or the spell is cast again on either connected creature; these are prose-only.
warding-bond::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending fields for caster HP 0, distance break, and recast on either linked creature.
warding-bond::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ending conditions for HP, range, and recast-on-linked-creature.

web::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Dexterity save and Restrained effect are represented, but the trigger is incomplete because it must fire the first time a creature enters on a turn or starts its turn there.
web::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area hazard trigger fields supporting enter-on-turn and starts-turn-there.
web::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime trigger data that combines first enter per turn and turn start.

web::terrain_or_surface.issue: Difficult terrain is represented, but Lightly Obscured, anchoring requirements, collapse timing, and 5-foot surface depth are not typed.
web::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add web terrain fields for lightly obscured, anchored/layered support, collapse timing, and depth.
web::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrain structure data for obscurity, anchoring, collapse, and depth.

web::created_object_or_structure.issue: The conjured webs have support/anchoring requirements and collapse if unsupported, but runtime does not model them as a created structure.
web::created_object_or_structure.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created web structure fields for anchor requirements and unsupported collapse.
web::created_object_or_structure.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdStructure data for web anchoring and collapse.

web::healing_or_restoration.issue: The detector matched Lightly Obscured wording, but Web has no healing or restoration mechanic.

web::status_or_state_change.issue: Restrained and the Strength (Athletics) escape action are represented, and the incorrect repeat save was removed; the remaining gap is the status duration while in webs or until escape.
web::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add status duration fields for while_in_area_or_until_escape.
web::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime status duration metadata tying Restrained to remaining in the webs or breaking free.

web::environmental_change.issue: The webs are flammable; exposed 5-foot cubes burn away in 1 round and deal fire damage to creatures starting in that fire. Damage is represented, but burn-away state is not.
web::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add flammable environmental object fields for cube size, burn duration, burn-away, and fire-start damage.
web::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime flammableStructure data for burning web cubes.

web::conditional_ending.issue: Unsupported webs collapse and the spell ends at the start of the caster's next turn; this conditional ending is prose-only.
web::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending fields for unsupported created area collapse at start of next turn.
web::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ending condition for unsupported web collapse.
web::conditional_ending.closedReason: Closed by adding the unsupported_area_collapses_next_turn conditional-ending trigger and recording Web's unsupported-area collapse ending in structured markdown and runtime JSON.

zone-of-truth::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Charisma save is represented and its frequency was corrected to every_time, but runtime still cannot express the combined first-enter-on-a-turn or starts-turn-there trigger.
zone-of-truth::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area trigger fields supporting enter-first-time-on-turn and starts-turn-there.
zone-of-truth::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime trigger composition for Zone of Truth's save timing.

zone-of-truth::message_or_communication.issue: On a failed save, a creature cannot speak a deliberate lie while in the radius, but runtime stores the speech restriction in prose.
zone-of-truth::message_or_communication.recommendedTemplateChange: Add truth/speech restriction fields for deliberate-lie blocking.
zone-of-truth::message_or_communication.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime truthZone data for failed-save lie prevention.

zone-of-truth::social_or_knowledge_effec.issue: The caster knows each save result, affected creatures are aware of the spell, and they may avoid answering while remaining truthful; these social/knowledge payloads are prose-only.
zone-of-truth::social_or_knowledge_effec.recommendedTemplateChange: Add knowledge payload fields for save-result awareness and affected-target awareness/evasive-answer behavior.
zone-of-truth::social_or_knowledge_effec.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledge/socialControl data for save-result disclosure, target awareness, and evasive-but-truthful answers.

zone-of-truth::conditional_ending.issue: The phrase 'until the spell ends' is ordinary duration scoping for the zone.
zone-of-truth::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No conditional-ending field required beyond timed duration.
